column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
North Lakeland has strong gusts of wind and rain that woke me up. Thanks Dennis for keeping us informed.
yes it was pretty bad here

Pasco near Mirada… we have sustained wind and then pretty gnarly wind gusts. And the rain… SOOO MUCH. It will be still and quiet for a few minutes and then start whipping around out there again.
It’s not bad, but I wasn’t thinking it would be this strong here.
Canals on Alafia in Riverview are flooding. Hopefully it'll stay out of the houses.
It’s been raining here in Venice since 8am. The winds and storms just woke me up.
me too
it was definitely a strong tropical storm. I had an appointment today that was even canceled
My dog just woke up and started barking. She never does that at night. In Lithia and getting a little thunder. Can’t sleep either.
we are awake too

Thank you for all real and level headed updates Dan. You are a rare gem in your line of work. I know these few months are your "active" time at work, I hope you are getting proper rest and nutrition. Love from my family to yours ❤️
Just woke up. Wind is strong, lots of rain and lightning in Lithia.
I have family there
same here in Valrico and we lost power.
I am getting tried of tornado warnings and watch’s. I saw Twister today, good day, . Those tornado were awesome, not in real life.
Really hoping the flooding starts to go down near Riviera Bay. Water is deep in front yard, but hasn’t reached inside our home yet.
Look at historical flooding data and elevation maps of the area. I grew up in this area, its gorgeous as its by water, but zone A. Good luck!
how’s it going at your place?
Please keep us posted. Eerie in Apollo Beach, can’t sleep. Feels like it got much hotter outside as well! Thank you for your awesome coverage, as always!
I am going to start thinking you have a little crush on the weather dude baby.
He does help to keep us safe. 👀🤣
omg I love it 😂
can't sleep here either. Especially when the alerts keep going off
oh yea I live in wimauma
Lakewood Ranch just lost power.
Summerfield crest, no power 😭
Peace River or FPL?
summerfield glades no power
I’m in summer field and have power
Will this head to Orlando? Brit flying in from England, due to arrive at 7pm
storm will be well to the north by then. You should be fine flying into Orlando.
what about at 1pm? I'm arriving at 1 pm.
I'm no weatherman but almost certainly not. Orlando has had it very easy with this storm.
thanks!
Might get a little rain worst case
us Brits can’t have no idea what real wind and rain is compared to you guys, hope everyone stays safe

I'm from Las Vegas originally, lived here less than 2 years, have had a couple hurricanes and didn't know what to expect so I'm learning haha. Tornados seem to be sticking to the southwest of FL. Also, really hope you enjoy your visit over here!
Thanks, hopefully the weather gets better!
At around 1am it got windier in Parrish than it was all day.
It's getting crazy here the wind is blowing rain Is falling thunder ⛈️ 🌬️

we've been going thru that since about 10 am yesterday. In Seminole, south of Clearwater, on the beach. Very high winds, and probably at least 10" of rain. It's still ripping pretty good out there, lost power at 11 pm. Just came back on, hoping it stays on. I hope it's not too bad for you for very long.. the storm is closer to landfall in big bend, so it's slowly pulling away 🤞
Pinellas park here. We lost power around 10:30 and it’s still out. I’m ready for this to be over
Thanks for your constant updated all night long Denis 😀
This is where I’m at palmetto/ parish
Thanks for the updates 🙏🏼everyone is safe.
Lakeland and my power is officially out haha
Thank you for all your updates, Denis!
Have you slept at all? Wind/thunder in Lake Alfred has been pretty loud the last hour or so .
Wow when the eye has moved so far away why is that area still getting hammered with tornado warnings and nowhere else ?
there's one big band that's just kind of sitting right on top of us and very slowly moving inland. It's why we've had a flash flood warning since 5pm yesterday (currently going through 5am today)
looks like it’s going to get worse even 😫
it’s the nasty side of the storm
it's been all day .. same spot
Denis Phillips centre lake is flooded we are trying to leave with 4 dogs we have no place to go
🙏🙏 Father God, asking you to supernaturally intervene and give them divine wisdom guidance direction discernment and protection to leave in their vehicle. In your name Jesus, Amen. 🙏🛐🛐🙏
A month ago people wanted a tropical storm.
Hope you’re ok Claire xxx
Man they have had so many down there
it's been so bad here, all day. It's crazy, flooding is terrible too
The future radar looks like the storm will get bigger….too much water! We need to rain to stop! I’m not at rule #7 but when water starts coming in I might….
Thank you for keeping us informed!

I am sure we have had over Ten inches in rain already here in north Sarasota near University Parkway coastal area and now this "Loudly" woke me up at 2:30am.....we are bordered by a creek that goes into Whittaker Bayou and then the Sarasota Bay---hoping we do not surround with flood waters like the last recent storm that walloped us from The Sunshine Skyway....sigh. So sorry for where this crawling storm "sits" it will be so very very devastating.....😑

🙏🛐🛐🙏 Praying for Father God to intervene. I don't think Debby is going to stall out like she was originally forecasted to. How is your property, street and yard doing?. I'm VERY sorry to hear that you lost everything in your art 🎙️ from the last flood. When is it supposed to stop raining there? After Debby makes landfall?? 🙏🙏

I'm over on the east coast of Florida in East Central Florida in Port Orange, just south of Daytona Beach. We aren't expected to deal with much, except the possibility of tornadoes this afternoon and evening. 🙏🙏

I have two twin Aunts and many cousins on the east coast-- but south near West Palm beach and Ft Lauderdale area! Yes your area does not really contend with too many big storms but anymore this weather is very unpredictable!!! Our home was not a flood zone when we bought it--BUT "development" contributed to the new menacing issue--as new builds are raised higher and just swamp older areas like ours--we have a woodsy acre maintained for wildlife--I am an artist and wildlife rescue rehabber and our pets are rescues from the streets sigh--just can't do enough in this world....❤

just looked outside at 4AM--- from porch light--- we are flooded again--the white iron patio furniture is under water which means my on ground art studio has flooded again--after repairs from last time. We will contend--oh well it could be worse of course--hope water stops rising so house can be okay--this old cottage is built 3 or four feet above ground--my husband just woke up--well I woke him up to tell him what I saw so he is is outside I was too afraid to look more....😶

Oh, ☹️, I'm so very sorry to hear this sister. I truly am. I know you just finished up your repairs last weekend, correct?? Have you ever considered relocating so you don't have to keep going through this? And/or evacuation to a hotel and take your supplies with you each time?? Praying for a quick cleanup for you. 🙏🙏

oh that's awesome that you are surrounded by family and that you are set up to evacuate if need be and you can go to your Mom's house/castle as well. 🙌✝️❤️🙌 My late friend Beryl Hurdle from the UK lived in a historic cottage for ALL the 25 years I knew her. Your cottage sounds interesting. You are one of the most interesting people I've met in a while. I've REALLY enjoyed my conversation with you. I saved your website to my Facebook page.
Hope you get some peaceful restful sleep today before you have to clean-up the mess. I'm praying in agreement with you for protection for everyone awaiting Debby. Blessings to you sister. 🌹❤️🌹
you don’t know what devastation is until you go through a storm like Ian ! Ask the people from Fort Myers Beach about it !
The tide is already coming up in port tampa..
Hopefully my new no sandbag system will work 🙏
